info.name: Ewentcast API
info.description:
Complete Ewentcast backend (post-merge).

Auth: Bearer {{authToken}} — Login/Register auto-save token.
Flow: Login → Connect Channels → Sync/Proxy → Dashboard / Registry / Billing.

Every request has Tests (pm.test) for Collection Runner. Soft checks: response + JSON + not 5xx. Key happy-path requests also assert 200/201.

Tip: Run Auth > Login first. Skip Purge / Delete / Refund in runner if you do not want side effects.

exec: pm.test("Body is JSON object or array", function () {
pm.test("Body is JSON object or array", function () {

item.name: Auth
item.description: Register → Login → Me (Bearer). Public auth routes use noauth. Logout is in Cleanup (end) so runner keeps the token.

exec: // Unique email so re-runs do not always 422 on duplicate

item.name: Eventbrite Proxy
item.description: Live Eventbrite v3 via privateToken. Create/update accept ticket_classes; catch-all proxies any other EB path.

exec: pm.test("Body is JSON object or array", function () {

request.description: Creates the Eventbrite event, then each ticket_class. Optional multipart: add logo/image file field to upload cover (returned as logo).

exec: pm.test("Body is JSON object or array", function () {

request.description: Eventbrite 3-step media upload. Returns media object (id, url). Use id as event.logo_id or attach file on create/update.

exec: pm.test("Body is JSON object or array", function () {

request.description: Multipart create: event + ticket_classes as JSON strings + logo file. Response includes logo media object.

exec: pm.test("Body is JSON object or array", function () {

request.description: Returns event with expand=logo,ticket_classes. Includes logo, image, and image_url helpers.

exec: pm.test("Body is JSON object or array", function () {

request.description: Updates event fields and ticket classes. Ticket with id → update; without id → create. Optional multipart logo file.

exec: pm.test("Body is JSON object or array", function () {

request.description: Multipart update: optional event JSON + new logo file. Response includes logo.

exec: pm.test("Body is JSON object or array", function () {
